summary: Product progress review complete. 4 tasks validated: TASK-138 (canvas state) and TASK-145 (log filters) APPROVED as production-ready with excellent quality (9.0-9.5/10). TASK-177 (visual polish) and TASK-183 (marketing) INCOMPLETE — design tokens only, not actual implementation. Critical findings: Epic 16 stalled 26+ cycles (requires GM escalation), user validation inactive 26 cycles (must activate immediately), P0 completion status unknown (backlog audit needed). Created 5 new stories/gaps: visual polish implementation (TASK-177b-e), marketing reschedule (TASK-183b-f), Epic 16 escalation, user validation activation (TASK-188-191), and backlog audit (TASK-192). Phase 2 at 11% completion — velocity critically slow for Cycle 225 target. Full review in pm-report-development-pm-c194.md.
